'''Annoo''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]]. The [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the original [[Annoo-dat]] [[Species/Legends|species]], they were referred to by [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] as [[Annoo-dat Prime]].

==History==
Discovered sometime between the [[Kymoodon Era]] and the [[Rianitus Period]], Annoo was under the control of the [[Hutt Empire]] as early as the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Remaining under [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] control for centuries, warfare erupted amongst the native Annoo-dat, leaving the world a barren wasteland.<ref name="TEA" /> Forced to flee the world, the Annoo-dat adopted space travel and left their homeworld in a mass exodus and conquered neighboring planet [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Gelefil]] in [[322 BBY/Legends|322 BBY]].<ref name="POLY" />

Annoo was eventually abandoned by the Hutts as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] reduced their territory. Left as a barren rock, no other galactic power fought over the world.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
